title: Vitax Hydrangea Feed, Specially Tailored, Added Magnesium and Iron, Improves Plant Health, Resealable 1KG Pouch
features: "IMPROVES PLANT HEALTH, QUALITY AND VITALITY: Vitax Hydrangea Feed is specifically formulated to provide hydrangeas with the essential nutrients they need to thrive, resulting in healthier, more vigorous plants. "
PRODUCES STUNNING, ABUNDANT BLOOMS AND HIGH-QUALITY FLOWERS: Enhances the flowering capacity of hydrangeas, ensuring they produce plentiful, vibrant blooms that add beauty to any garden.

TAILORED FOR HYDRANGEAS' NUTRITIONAL NEEDS: Vitax Hydrangea Feed contains added magnesium and iron to address the specific requirements of hydrangeas, promoting robust growth and vibrant flower colors.

EASY TO APPLY DURING PLANTING AND AS A TOP DRESSING: For optimal results, incorporate into the soil during planting and reapply as a top dressing in spring to maintain nutrient levels throughout the growing season.

SAFE AND CONVENIENT TO USE: As with all granular fertilisers, it should be stored in a cool, dry place and kept out of reach of children and animals. Always follow the label instructions and wear protective gloves when handling.
